meaning: adj.贫穷的,处于不利地位的
examples: Children living in inner-city areas may be educationally disadvantaged.
The same is not certain when it comes to students from more disadvantaged backgrounds.
He hopes he will be an inspiration for other young people from disadvantaged backgrounds.
According to the Guttmacher Institute, 69% of women having abortions are economically disadvantaged.
Rodriguez is keenly aware of the importance of college for kids from disadvantaged backgrounds.
